name: Homemade Cream Liqueurs
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk
1 1/4 cups Flavored liqueur (almond, coffee, orange, or mint)
1 cup Whipping cream or coffee cream (1/2 pint)
recipeInstructions:
-----------------------------
1. In a blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator up to one month.
4. Stir before serving.
Use only Grade A clean, uncracked eggs.
Eagle Brand Quick & Easy
Typed by Dale/Gail Shipp
